scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backPOS-go && go build -o server.exe ./cmd/api && .\server.exe" "cd FrontPOS-main && npm run dev:mobile" "powershell -Command Start-Sleep -s 10; start http://localhost:9002"
scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd backPOS-go && go mod tidy" "cd FrontPOS-main && npm install"
